feed.title: Jimin PARK
feed.subtitle: Personal academic website of Jimin Park — industrial engineering, manufacturing scheduling, optimization, and reinforcement learning.

entry.title: Welcome to my blog
entry.content:
Welcome! This is the first post on my site’s blog. I’ll use this space for notes on scheduling, reinforcement learning, LLMs, and research life.

How to add a new post

To publish a post, add a Markdown file to the _posts/ folder with a file name in the form YYYY-MM-DD-a-short-title.md, and start it with this header:

---
layout: post
title: Your post title
date: 2026-07-19 10:00:00+0900
description: One line shown under the title
tags: scheduling llm
categories: research
---

Everything below the second --- is the body, written in Markdown. Once you commit the file, the site rebuilds and the post appears here automatically.

You can write bold, italic, links, lists, code blocks, images, and math ($E = mc^2$).

Feel free to delete this post once you’ve published your own.
entry.summary: A first post — and a quick guide to how I write here.
